response.justification: Strong generalist senior engineer with 13+ years of polyglot experience and recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, but the resume lacks demonstrated production GenAI delivery, RAG/vector database experience, multi-agent framework work, and significant cloud-platform AI system design. Customer-facing technical leadership and discovery experience is also not evident. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent AI work, but not a clear staff-level GenAI FDE match on paper.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across TypeScript/Node, with recent MCP and agent tooling work
Polyglot range (TS, Python-adjacent, DLang, C/C++, Java) and proven full-stack delivery
Track record of mentoring, workshops, and public technical teaching relevant to FDE customer-facing role
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Limited evidence of designing AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure at production scale
No clear customer-facing discovery or enterprise consulting experience demonstrated

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling work at re:cinq
